label: Subagent • run failure -> execution_error (feed still fired)
query: A scripted subagent that fails inside its run loop.
notes: Model-free. The kind emits a phase then throws .executionFailed inside run; the host maps it to `execution_error` AND the feed must still carry the phase it emitted before failing (the run got far enough to register the feed). Pins the failure path past permission.
